case_title: JACQUAY M. BOONE VS. LASHAWNTE Q. BENNETT

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT BENNETT, LASHAWNTE Q.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT OF 4/30/14 TO AUG-04-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS UNTIL JUDGMENT OF $4681.00 IS PAID IN FULL. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED JAN-24-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, LASHAWNTE Q.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT OF 4/30/13 TO FEB-04-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT OF 4/30/13 TO MAR-09-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BENNETT, LASHAWNTE Q. HEARING SET FOR APR-29-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY LASHAWNTE Q. BENNETT IS GRANTED. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-29-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTHS. "DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $250 PER MONTH TO PLAINTIFF BEGINNING MAY 10, 2013 AND CONTINUING ON TO THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE BALANCE OF $4681.00 IS PAID. PAYMENTS WILL BE MADE THROUGH THE COURT" PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0713516D004, TAG # 031735 BY DEFENDANT BENNETT, LASHAWNTE Q.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOONE, JACQUAY M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENNETT, LASHAWNTE Q. $4,681.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,766.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-09-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS UNTIL JUDGMENT IS PAID. JPT JEAN MILEFF, CLERK: B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-04-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PURSUANT TO THE HEARING DATE OF APRIL 30, 2013, THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR SIX MONTHS TO SEPTEMBER 4, 2015 AT 03:30PM FOR DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE PAYING PLAINTIFF $250 PER MONTH ON THE 10TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL BALANCE OF $4,681.00 IS PAID IN FULL. PAYMENTS WILL BE MADE THROUGH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,681.00 FILED BY BOONE, JACQUAY M. AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, LASHAWNTE Q. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 4/30/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
